answers: Recycling is the process of converting waste materials into new products. It reduces landfill waste, conserves resources, and helps protect the environment.
Ghore recycle korte: paper, plastic, glass, ar metal alada koro. Reusable bags use koro, single-use plastic avoid koro, ar compost korte paro organic waste.
You can recycle paper, cardboard, glass bottles, aluminum cans, and many plastics. Check local guidelines as rules vary. Clean items before recycling — contaminated items may be rejected.

To reduce waste, follow the 3 R's: Reduce (buy less), Reuse (use items multiple times), Recycle (process waste into new products). Small changes in daily habits can significantly reduce your environmental footprint.
